title: Balmy food
description: This mod will perfectly omplements and enhances the food and its variety the classic Minecraft, and add new food options. The mod is ideal for vanilla minecraft, and will expand the possibilities.
body:
# This mod will perfectly omplements and enhances the food and its variety the classic Minecraft, and add new food options. The mod is ideal for vanilla minecraft, and will expand the possibilities.
# So you can get serious about cooking in Minecraft.

• List
 - Tools
  · Frying Pan
  · Pestle
  · Mortar
  · Wooden knife
  · Stone knife
  · Iron knife
  · Gold knife
  · Diamond knife
  · Netherite knife
  - Chocolate
  · Chocolate bar
  · Chocolate powder
  · Chocolate brick
  · Chocolate bowl
  · Chocolate powder block
  · Chocolate block
  · Chocolate bricks
  · Chocolate covered apple
  · Chocolate covered sweet berries
  · Chocolate Cake
  · Chocolate Pie
 - Flour products
  · Flour
  · Dough
  · Raw bread
  · Balmy bread
  · Slice of bread
  · Toast
 - Bottles
  · Spherical bottle 
  · Contains: water; milk; honey;
 - Golden [Items] 
  · Golden beetroot
  · Golden sweet berries
  · Golden glow berries
  · Golden bread
 - Honey
  · Honey cake
  · Honeyed apple
  · Honeyed sweet berries
 - Others
  · Grape
  · Grape pie
  · Sweet berries pie
  · Soul pepper
  · Soul pepper seeds
  · Beef sandwich
  · Chicken sandwich
  · Porkchop sandwich
  · Sour-Sweet salad
  · Crimson fungus soup
  · Warped fungus soup
  · Fried Egg
  · Sugar powder 
  · Sugar powder block
  · Salt
  · Salt block

- Music Disc · Vain - Pleasure
- Music Disc · Vain - Balmy Adventure

Me:[Kvadrat_Q](https://bento.me/kvadrat-q)
Music artist:[Vain](https://bento.me/prodvainn)
